name: Colbor CL100X Bi-Color LED Video Monolight
description: The ultracompact, lightweight, and portable CL100X Bi-Color LED Video Monolight from COLBOR features an expansive 2700-6500K CCT color range with a high CRI rating of 97+ for advanced accuracy in color rendering.

features.Key Features :: For Video Production and Vlogging | 25,645 Lux at 3.3' (6500K) | 2700-6500K CCT, CRI: 97+ | AC or Optional V-Mount / NP-F Batteries | Proprietary Wireless, App Control | LCD Display for Easy Operation | 13 Special Effects | Bowens Accessory Mount | Weighs 2.1 lb | Modular and Stackable Design
features.Standard Package: COLBOR CL100X Bi-Color LED Video Monolight | Reflector | Bowens Mount Adapter | Power Adapter | Stand Holder | COB Protective Cover | Carrying Bag
